HomeAssistantMQTT.description: MQTT integration for sending vision results to Home Assistant

enabled.description: Enable MQTT integration with Home Assistant

broker_host.description: MQTT broker hostname or IP address

device_name.description: Device name displayed in Home Assistant

retain.description: Set retain flag on MQTT messages

send_discovery.description: Send Home Assistant discovery configuration messages

motion_topic.description: MQTT topic suffix for motion detection messages

objects_topic.description: MQTT topic suffix for object detection messages

summary_topic.description: MQTT topic suffix for summary statistics messages

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for reporting objects

report_all_frames.description: Send MQTT message for every frame (vs only on changes)

include_coordinates.description: Include bounding box coordinates in object messages
